title: Add async retry support to API client
description: Publicly listed OSS issue with a fixed bounty for adding retry support to an API client.
scope_summary: Implement async retry support for the official API client without changing unrelated auth flows.

title: Public program bounty up to $5,000
description: Official public program with published rewards and in-scope API assets.
scope_summary: Review the official scope summary for listed web and API targets that are eligible under the program rules.
